title: Sumikko Style Cafe Base Rap Compilation

synonyms: Sumikko Gurashi x Cafe Base Collaboration
alternative_titles.ja: すみっコ流 カフェベースRAP 総集編

synopsis:
"Sumikko Gurashi", which celebrates its 10th anniversary this year, and Suntory "BOSS Cafe Base" are collaborating.

The video is Sumikko Gurashi's first rap song that introduces various ways to split the cafe bass.

(Source: ORICON NEWS Official YouTube Channel; translated)
